name: Oysters and Wild Rice Casserole
recipeInstructions:
(may substitute wild rice and long grain rice mixture)
While the rice is cooking according to package directions, brown onions and celery in butter. Remove from heat and add milk, flour, salt, sage, thyme, and black pepper. Add well-drained rice to the mixture. Pour into a 2-quart casserole. Drain oysters and let soak in lukewarm, melted butter over the rice mixture. Spread the oysters evenly. Top with Ritz cracker crumbs. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes or until oysters curl.
